kpis.name: Aerials won
kpis.description: Number of aerial duels won (by first contact).

kpis.name: Attacking aerials won
kpis.description: Number of attacking aerial duels won (by first contact) in attacking 60% of the pitch adjusted by possession.

kpis.name: Headed plays
kpis.description: Number of successful head passes or head shots in the attacking half adjusted by possession.
